title: Journey Pack
description:
The ultimate customizable starter pack for switching to The Good Habit.

The Journey Pack includes:

  • Your choice of Solano device, Prominent device or both 
  • Your choice of 3, 6, or all Core flavors
  • Clean Kit (1 microfiber cloth, 1 pipe cleaner)
  • Optional additional accessory item of your choice

Upgrade your Journey Pack to Solano - our most elite device yet! Solano features a premium Walnut Barrel, and a velvety smooth coating on the Onyx Black mouthpiece.

Or, choose our Prominent option - our original and much-loved FÜM device, with a Maple Barrel and silver colored mouthpiece. 

FÜM helps replace the habit by combining the familiar hand-to-mouth action with flavored air and a built-in fidget experience.

Insert your core of choice, adjust the airflow to suit you, and breathe in for a moment of calm.

There’s no vapor, no smoke, and no electronics, so you can take your pocket-sized sidekick everywhere. 

*Willpower not included. We provide the goods, you provide the magic. 

 

**The Journey Pack comes with either our original FÜM Prominent featuring a Maple Barrel and a silver mouthpiece, or our FÜM Solano, with a Walnut Barrel and Onyx Black mouthpiece or both devices. You can choose to add on an extra accessory item from the menu. Please note that the optional Barrel add-on does not come with a mouthpiece. 

Everyone's health needs are unique. If you have any health concerns, we encourage you to check with your healthcare provider before using FÜM.
